Interface ModelPlugin<G>

All Superinterfaces:
Plugin
All Known Implementing Classes:
BmdaModelPlugin, BoaEbnaModelPlugin, CgaFrequencyModelPlugin, CmaEsStrategyModelPlugin, CopulaBaselineModelPlugin, DiagonalGaussianModelPlugin, EdgeHistogramModelPlugin, FullGaussianModelPlugin, GmmModelPlugin, HierarchicalBoaModelPlugin, KdeModelPlugin, MallowsModelPlugin, MimicModelPlugin, NormalizingFlowModelPlugin, PbilFrequencyModelPlugin, PlackettLuceModelPlugin, SNesModelPlugin, TokenCategoricalModelPlugin, UmdaBernoulliModelPlugin, XNesModelPlugin
public interface ModelPlugin<G> extends Plugin
Plugin factory for probabilistic models.
